MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PRAXEDES DEMESA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND.
APPEARANCES: ERIN RADEKIN, ESQUIRE (LAW OFFICES OF JOHN DURCE, 916.441.0562) APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THERE ARE NO OTHER APPEARANCES.
RULING: COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED BASED ON C.C.P. SECTION 473.5(c) AND THE DEMESA DECLARATION ESTABLISHING LACK OF KNOWLEDGE OF JOSIE ROJIOS AND THE ERRONEOUS ZIP CODE. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO SUBMIT A FORM OF ORDER. (302/PJM/VC) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-07-2007 Continued To Dec-28-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Trish Abalos.
Robert Resner, Esq. for Plaintiff: Creditor Trade Assoc., Inc., dba Great Western Collection Bureau.
Plaintiff's Witness: Ronal Abelman, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: SNF Properties, Inc. a California corp., and Praxedes B. Demesa, aka Seby Demesa as follows:
Damages $66,671.08
Prejudgment Interest $3,682.56
Attorney's Fees by motion or memo of costs.
Costs $430.00, for a total of $70,783.64
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-27-2007 Continued To Nov-16-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
